title: Communauté de communes de la Brie Boisée
summary: The Communauté de communes de la Brie Boisée is a former communauté de communes in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in December 1994. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Val Briard in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes de la Brie Boisée is a former communauté de communes in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in December 1994. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Val Briard in January 2017.

Composition
The Communauté de communes comprised the following communes:

Favières
Ferrières-en-Brie
Pontcarré
Villeneuve-le-Comte
Villeneuve-Saint-Denis
